hero_subtitle: SFTY connects multi-provider KYT outputs into one audit-ready workflow that supports FCA-specific rules monitoring, case management, evidence preservation and Travel Rule compliance operations.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: KYT workflows remain disconnected from FCA compliance
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to link wallet risk signals with FCA-specific regulatory requirements and operational workflows. This disconnect slows reviews, fragments evidence, and complicates audit readiness for digital asset businesses under FCA oversight.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates KYT provider risk signals with FCA-specific compliance rules, case workflows, evidence capture and audit-ready reporting to streamline reviews and support jurisdictional regulatory oversight.
workflow_title: From wallet risk to FCA compliance decisions
workflow_description: SFTY aggregates KYT provider signals and routes them through risk review, case management, evidence collection and decision logging for FCA regulatory adherence.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented checks. One FCA-ready layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects KYT outputs into FCA-specific workflows, cases, decisions and evidence, enabling VASPs to manage multi-provider compliance with audit-ready, jurisdiction-focused operational control.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with governed KYT review, audit-ready evidence preservation and enterprise deployment to meet FCA operational and bank due diligence standards.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support FCA-specific KYT monitoring workflows
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how KYT alerts connect to FCA case investigations
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit evidence supports FCA compliance reviews
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe provider orchestration for FCA jurisdictional rule adherence
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for FCA compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY supports FCA compliance teams by connecting KYT monitoring, Travel Rule, case management, and multi-jurisdiction rule updates into one structured workflow above providers.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY connect KYT workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY aggregates and orchestrates KYT alerts from multiple providers, enabling structured review, risk scoring, alert triage, and case creation tailored to FCA-specific jurisdictional policies.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves audit-ready evidence by capturing decision logs, case histories, provider results, and supporting documents to provide traceability for FCA regulatory inspections.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates with existing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, connecting their outputs into connected workflows with access governance and audit logging.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYT or screening providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace KYT or screening providers but connects their outputs to create consistent, auditable compliance workflows and evidence packages.
final_title: Connect KYT workflows to FCA compliance operations
final_description: Review how SFTY organizes multi-provider KYT outputs into FCA-ready cases, evidence packages and regulatory rule monitoring.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
